HGSS.115.0000:
Hello, dear.\f
I sell inexpensive herbal medicine.
They’re good, but a trifle bitter.\f
Your Pokémon may not like them.
Hehehehe... [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0001:
Hiya! Care to see some bargains?\f
I sell rare items that nobody else
carries--but only one of\r
each item. [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0005:
You bought that already. I’m all
sold out of it. [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0010:
Welcome!\f
I run the Pokémon Salon!\f
I’m the older and better of the two
Haircut Brothers.\f
I can make your Pokémon beautiful for
just $500.\f
Grooming gives a better look.
Your Pokémon will become friendlier and\r
more beautiful.\f
Would you like me to do that? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0011: Which Pokémon should I work on?
HGSS.115.0014: Is that right? That’s a shame!
HGSS.115.0015: You’ll need more money than that.
HGSS.115.0016:
I do only one haircut a day, sorry.
I’m done for today.
HGSS.115.0017:
Welcome to the Pokémon Salon!\f
I’m the younger and less expensive of
the two Haircut Brothers.\f
I’ll spruce up your Pokémon for
just $300.\f
Grooming gives a better look.
Your Pokémon will become friendlier and\r
more beautiful.\f
So? How about it?
HGSS.115.0018: OK, which Pokémon should I spruce up?
HGSS.115.0019: OK! I hope I do a good job!
HGSS.115.0022: You’re a little short on funds.
HGSS.115.0023:
I have a feeling that it won’t go well
next time. Let me close for the day!
HGSS.115.0029:
Welcome to the Memorial Photo Studio.
We are no ordinary studio!\f
You can wear a Team Rocket uniform
to take a picture!\f
Would you like to try it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0030:
Please stand in front of the camera
once you have changed.\f
HGSS.115.0031:
Are you ready?\f
Come on!
Look cool as if you own the world!\f
HGSS.115.0032:
Good job.\f
You can check the picture using the PC.
HGSS.115.0033:
You can wear a Team Rocket uniform
to take a picture!\f
Would you like to try it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0034:
...Fair enough.\f
No one should look up to Team Rocket.
HGSS.115.0035:
Hmm. Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.115.0036:
Huh?
Are you a newcomer, too?\f
We had to recruit new members for the
Radio Tower mission.\r
Then we ran out of uniforms.\f
I heard this studio has some, so I
decided to “borrow” one.\f
Since you are here, why don’t you
change as well?\f
HGSS.115.0037:
Look at you! Pretty good!\f
Oh, but you shouldn’t try to scare
people walking around looking\r
like that, OK?
HGSS.115.0039:
Ooh, your Pokémon are so very
charming! How enchanting!\f
If you dress up your Pokémon here,
make it a sight to behold!\f
Then I will even hang a picture of one
in the other room!\f
You will do this, won’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0040:
Oh, you silly thing...
Where’s your sense of adventure?
HGSS.115.0041:
Ooh, ooh, yes! How nice!
Let’s not delay!\f
Should I explain to you how
to dress up your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0042:
Ooh, I wonder which Pokémon you’ll
dress up?\f
HGSS.115.0043:
Teeheehee...
I hope you will dress it up adorably!\f
HGSS.115.0044:
You have a Fashion Case, don’t you?
Ah, oui, wonderful!\f
Just choose the Accessories and put
them on your Pokémon.\f
When you’re done, I will snap a photo
and put it up beside me!\f
If you mix your records with others,
you can get their photos, too!\f
I think it will be much easier if 
you will just try! [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0045:
Ooh, nice work!
Let’s display the photo right away!\r
Oh, but it needs to have a title!\f
HGSS.115.0046:
[011C,0000,0000]...\f
Ooh, yes, yes! I get it now!
Your aesthetics shine through!\f
HGSS.115.0047:
Oh, non, non, non!
It will be forlorn without a title.\f
HGSS.115.0048:
Oh... You came out without doing
anything... How disappointing.
HGSS.115.0049:
If you dress up any Pokémon again,
the photo here will be changed.\f
Would you like to dress up
a Pokémon, dearie? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0050:
Why don’t I dress up myself and hang a
picture...?\f
The title should be...
Hmm...how about “Girl’s Paradise”?
HGSS.115.0051:
Ooh, non, non, non! That’s an Egg!
It’s too young to be dressing up!\f
HGSS.115.0052:
I put your photo up right here.
It just looks so perfect there!
HGSS.115.0053:
It’s a frame for holding a
portrait photo.
HGSS.115.0055:
Team Rocket members in black suits
have been running around...\f
I was wondering what was going on.
So, you took on Team Rocket?\r
You are impressive!\f
You may be able to face the
legendary Poké...\f
HGSS.115.0056:
Hahaha! Never mind.\f
I must go now.\f
HGSS.115.0057:
Take a look!\f
This is a drawing for Accessories.
You never know what you’re gonna get.\f
Would you like to try for $100? [0200,0000]
HGSS.115.0058:
Wow, you are great!
So many Accessories and wallpapers!\f
Go ahead and dress up your Pokémon!
HGSS.115.0060:
Oh, no!
You’re short on funds.
